stories.action: set the active tax regime and the 6% USN Income rate
stories.value: the platform can calculate tax using approved parameters
ac: The admin can define USN Income as the active MVP tax regime
The admin can set the tax rate as 6%
The setting is versioned with author and timestamp
The system rejects an empty or non-positive rate

stories.action: receive realization posting events with a unique document ID
stories.value: tax calculation starts automatically after each valid realization
ac: The platform receives document ID, date, amount, currency, organization, and manager ID
Only posted realization events trigger the calculation pipeline
Duplicate document IDs are ignored without creating a second tax calculation
Rejected events are logged with a technical reason

stories.action: store cumulative revenue from the start of the tax year
stories.value: each calculation uses the correct year-to-date tax base
ac: Revenue is accumulated by organization and tax year
A positive realization increases cumulative revenue
A zero or negative realization does not create tax payable and adjusts cumulative revenue when applicable
The register can return the current cumulative amount in under 300 ms for 10000 active monthly documents

stories.action: calculate USN Income tax after realization posting
stories.value: tax is calculated immediately and consistently without manual Excel work
ac: The system calculates deal tax as realization amount multiplied by the configured rate
The system calculates cumulative tax as year-to-date revenue multiplied by the configured rate
Amounts below 0.5 RUB are rounded to 1 RUB when tax is payable
The calculation result stores tax base, rate, deal tax, cumulative tax, and timestamp
The calculation completes in under 300 ms for the MVP data volume

stories.action: block tax calculation when the required tax rate is missing
stories.value: incorrect tax amounts are not silently produced
ac: If the active rate is absent, no tax calculation snapshot is marked successful
The realization receives a calculation error state
The admin sees the message: Configure tax parameters
The error is written to the audit log

stories.action: see the tax amount for my own realization
stories.value: I understand how the deal affects tax load without seeing full accounting reports
ac: The realization card shows only the tax amount for the manager's own deal
The manager cannot access the full tax register
If calculation failed, the card shows a concise calculation unavailable state
The displayed amount matches the stored calculation snapshot

stories.action: view a simple cumulative revenue and tax report
stories.value: I can prepare tax control data without manual report consolidation
ac: The report shows realization date, document ID, amount, cumulative revenue, rate, and cumulative tax
The report can be filtered by organization and tax year
The report is available only to Accountant and Finance Director roles
The report totals match the stored calculation snapshots

stories.action: store accepted expense amounts for USN Income minus Expenses
stories.value: the platform can calculate tax base for the second USN mode
ac: Expense records can be linked to organization, tax year, and source document
Only accepted expenses are included in the tax base
Expense totals are available for calculation by period
The data model keeps income and expense sources auditable

stories.action: calculate USN Income minus Expenses at 15%
stories.value: companies using this mode can receive automated tax calculations
ac: The admin can select USN Income minus Expenses as the active regime
The system calculates tax base as accepted income minus accepted expenses
The system applies a 15% rate by default
Negative tax base does not create positive tax payable
The calculation snapshot identifies the selected regime

stories.action: maintain USN revenue thresholds for 150, 200, and 450 million RUB
stories.value: limit checks use consistent regulatory thresholds
ac: The MVP/R1 thresholds are available to the calculation service
Threshold values are stored with effective dates
The system can identify the next threshold above current revenue
Threshold changes are audit logged

stories.action: detect when cumulative revenue crosses a USN threshold
stories.value: finance can react before the company loses the special tax regime
ac: The system compares revenue before and after each realization
A crossing event is created only when a threshold is newly crossed
The event includes threshold, previous revenue, new revenue, and source document ID
Duplicate realization processing does not create duplicate crossing events

stories.action: flag backdated realizations posted into a closed period
stories.value: accounting can manually review calculations that may be inaccurate
ac: The system identifies realizations dated before the current closed-period boundary
The realization is not blocked from posting
The tax calculation snapshot is marked requires_manual_review
The accountant sees the review flag in the tax register

stories.action: receive an email warning when a USN limit is exceeded
stories.value: I can start tax regime transition actions on time
ac: The email is sent to configured finance recipients after a threshold crossing event
The message includes organization, crossed threshold, revenue after posting, and document ID
A failed email send is retried and logged
The same crossing event is not emailed more than once

stories.action: manually correct a tax calculation with a comment
stories.value: I can handle exceptional accounting cases while preserving traceability
ac: The accountant can adjust tax base or tax amount on a calculation snapshot
A non-empty correction comment is required
The original calculated values remain visible
The correction author and timestamp are audit logged

stories.action: store immutable tax calculation snapshots for every realization version
stories.value: calculation history remains transparent after document changes
ac: Each calculation snapshot stores source document version and input values
Recalculation creates a new snapshot instead of overwriting the old one
Snapshots can be queried by document ID and tax year
Audit events link document changes to calculation versions

stories.action: enforce role-based access to tax registers and settings
stories.value: sensitive tax data is visible only to authorized roles
ac: Only Accountant and Finance Director can view the full tax register
Only Compliance/Admin can change tax settings
Sales Manager can view only own deal tax amount
All access denials and privileged actions are logged

stories.action: forecast next quarter tax using linear extrapolation
stories.value: finance can estimate future payment obligations before period close
ac: The forecast uses historical realization data from the current tax year
The forecast outputs expected revenue, tax base, and tax amount
The forecast states the method and input period used
If there is insufficient history, the system returns forecast unavailable

stories.action: view the next quarter tax forecast in the tax report
stories.value: I can plan cash flow for upcoming tax payments
ac: The report shows forecast revenue, forecast tax, and confidence note
The forecast is separated from actual tax payable
The user can filter the forecast by organization
The report shows when the forecast was last generated

stories.action: export tax register data in a format suitable for declaration preparation
stories.value: I can reuse platform data for FNS declaration workflows
ac: The export includes organization, period, revenue, expense where applicable, tax base, tax amount, and correction markers
The export is generated from calculation snapshots
The export can be downloaded by Accountant and Finance Director roles
The export contains a generation timestamp and source data version

stories.action: send prepared declaration data to the FNS channel through an EDI operator
stories.value: accounting can reduce manual declaration data entry
ac: The integration sends only approved export packages
The request and response are logged with correlation ID
Failed submissions keep the package available for retry
The integration status is visible to Accountant and Finance Director roles

stories.action: receive realization documents from external ERP systems through an API
stories.value: external systems can trigger the same tax calculation flow
ac: The API accepts realization document payloads with required tax calculation fields
The API validates uniqueness of external document IDs
Accepted documents enter the same pipeline as internal realization events
Invalid payloads return structured validation errors

stories.action: expose tax calculation snapshots through a secure API
stories.value: external ERP systems can reconcile tax results with platform records
ac: The API returns snapshots by organization, period, and document ID
The API requires service authentication
The API never exposes data across unauthorized organizations
Responses include snapshot version and correction status

stories.action: manage tax thresholds and rounding rules through the admin interface
stories.value: regulatory parameters can be updated without a code release
ac: The admin can create a new effective-dated threshold set
The admin can update rounding rules within allowed validation constraints
Existing calculations keep the parameter version used at calculation time
All changes are audit logged

stories.action: receive tax payment status from a payment gateway
stories.value: future automatic tax payment workflows can reconcile payment results
ac: The platform accepts payment status callbacks for tax payment references
Callbacks are authenticated and logged
Unknown payment references are rejected
Payment status is stored separately from calculated tax payable

personas.name: Sales Manager
personas.desc: Creates realization documents and sees tax impact only for own deals

personas.name: Finance Director
personas.desc: Monitors accumulated tax, limits, forecasts, and business risk

personas.name: Accountant
personas.desc: Uses tax register, reviews calculation history, corrections, and declaration exports

personas.name: Compliance/Admin
personas.desc: Configures tax parameters, thresholds, rounding rules, and access controls

personas.name: Platform
personas.desc: Backend/system role that processes realization events, calculates tax, stores snapshots, checks limits, and integrates with external services

milestones.label: MVP release: USN Income 6% automatic calculation
R1 release: Income minus Expenses, limits, corrections, audit
R2 release: forecast, FNS/EDI and ERP APIs

legal.name: Validate USN calculation logic against Chapter 26.2 of the Tax Code of Russia
Confirm actual company tax regime, advance payment treatment, and RUB-only MVP assumption
Confirm FNS/EDI declaration export requirements and data retention obligations
